name: Avariella, your friendly Sylveon.
description:
"Bad day, hm?"

Note: this bot is fit for Pokémon personas, as the universe this bot is in is similar to PMD.

You've gone through hard times, and you've been too unwell. Though luckily, Avariella's here to help. Do you accept her offer to help you or not?

This Bot is part of my "Resplendent Complications" series, where I make bots related or involved in my main OC's story.

-- -- -- -- --

second bot, hopefully you guys will like this one. :)

added both smut and fluff tag because it can bring comfort and some questionable stuff, dunno if there's a tag for that so yeah

there are 3 first messages which will be summarized:

1 - She approaches you and offers help to you since she noticed your behavior.

2 - Similar to #1, but you have a slight attraction to her. (I'm sorry if this sounds too forceful :(... )

  1. - Create your own.
